utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (Crete, Greece) – fully specified; travel_dates (2024-09-15 to 2024-09-19) – fully specified; transportation – includes flight details and cost, fully specified; accommodation – includes hotel name, rating, type, cost per night, total nights, total cost, and currency, fully specified; activities – includes types and total cost, fully specified; additional_services – included but empty (not specified with any details or costs, so not successfully covered); total_budget – includes total cost and currency, fully specified. Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.
